title: Servux
description: Servux is a server-side mod that provides support for some client-side mods, such as sending structure bounding boxes for MiniHUD
body:
# Description

Servux is a **server-side** mod that provides extra support and features for some client-side mods when playing on a that server.

Servux itself is **never needed on the clients or in single player**. It's only needed/useful on the server side in multiplayer.

The only case where it's useful on the client, is for the player who hosts a LAN game. That way the other players who connect get the benefits just as they would on a dedicated server.

# Features
In version `0.1.x` it only has one feature, which is sending structure bounding box data to MiniHUD when it asks for it, so that it can render the structure bounding boxes also in multiplayer.

There are a lot more features planned later on, at which point there will also be commands to turn features on or off. Currently in `0.1.x` since there is only one feature, there are no commands yet. If you want the structure bounding box support, install the mod. Otherwise don't.
